overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a dark, industrial film storage room with a flashlight. The character examines shelves of film reels, a projector machine, and service window before moving into a narrow storage corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor leading to storage room

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark storage room, flashlight illuminating the green walls and shelves ahead

entered.detail: tall metal shelving unit filled with film cans and reels
deteriorating green painted concrete walls with stains
cardboard storage box on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow corridor in an industrial building, flashlight beam revealing green painted walls and the entrance to a storage room containing metal shelving units.

scene_state.functional_zone: film reel storage area with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: slowly walking around the shelf area, examining the film reels and objects with the flashlight

entered.detail: red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall
stacked metal film cans and reels on the shelves
large metal valve wheel attached to the wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the storage area, panning the flashlight across metal shelves filled with film reels, revealing a fire extinguisher and valve wheel mounted on the green walls.

events.description: character turns away from the film shelves and walks toward a large industrial projector machine

agents.ego_description: turning away from the shelves and approaching the large projector machine on the table

entered.detail: large vintage film projector machine with reels and lens
wooden work table supporting the projector
heavy red curtain hanging in the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the storage shelves toward a large industrial film projector sitting on a wooden table, passing a red curtain in the doorway.

events.description: moves from the projector area to a service window with a counter

agents.ego_description: walking to the service window counter and examining the area with the flashlight

entered.detail: service window with counter and metal bars

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the projector behind and approaches a service window with a counter, shining the flashlight on the metal bars and surface of the window hatch.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between tall storage shelves

events.description: enters narrow aisle between tall shelving units filled with film reels

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor between tall film storage shelves, venturing deeper into the storage area

entered.detail: metal ladder leaning against the shelving unit
tall metal shelving units lining both sides of the narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow aisle between towering film storage shelves, the flashlight beam illuminating the metal ladder and endless rows of film cans as he walks deeper into the storage corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial facility that transitions from a small storage room into a deep, towering archive of film reels. It begins as the character enters a narrow corridor with green walls, moving into a storage area where the flashlight beam sweeps across metal shelving units, a fire extinguisher, and a valve wheel. As the camera moves away from the shelves, it passes a red curtain in a doorway to reveal a large industrial film projector resting on a wooden table. The scene then shifts toward a service window, illuminating the metal bars and counter surface before turning away to enter a narrow aisle. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the storage corridor, where the light catches a metal ladder and endless rows of film cans stacked on towering shelves.
